checks.name: Primary manifest exists
checks.evidence: package.json at root; name='atomic-crm', version='0.1.0'. No competing manifests.

checks.name: Manifest parseable and complete
checks.evidence: Valid JSON; name, 45 production + 26 dev deps, 60+ scripts including dev/build/test/lint/typecheck/seed.

checks.name: Language/framework detectable
checks.evidence: TypeScript ^5.9.3, React Admin ^5.10.0, React 19, Supabase JS ^2.75.1 from manifest deps.

checks.name: README explains purpose
checks.evidence: README.md: purpose (sales CRM for food brokers), Quick Start (5 steps), tech stack.

checks.name: Claude Code context file exists
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md at root + full .claude/ directory with rules/, commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/.

checks.name: Context file quality
checks.evidence: 109 lines, 5 sections: Architecture, Engineering, Design, Testing/DB, Business Domain. Imperative language.

checks.name: Modular rules exist
checks.evidence: 12 rules files with stable IDs (CORE/DB/DOM/PRV/UI/MOD/STALE/AGT). RULE_INDEX.md maps 150 legacy items.

checks.name: Context coverage vs codebase size
checks.evidence: 14 context files per 1,375 source files. 3 commands, 16 agents, 155 skill files.

checks.name: CLAUDE.md exists specifically
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md at project root, 109 lines.

checks.name: Context includes testing instructions
checks.evidence: npm test, Vitest, renderWithAdminContext, E2E, seed commands, pgTAP documented.

checks.name: Context includes build/run commands
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md has test and supabase commands but no npm run build, npm run dev, npm run lint directly. Build/lint only in RULE_COMMANDS.md.

checks.name: Rules files exist in .claude/rules/
checks.evidence: 12 files; 10 of 12 have YAML frontmatter with globs:. 2 intentionally unscoped (CORE_CONSTRAINTS, AGENT_ROUTING).

checks.name: CLAUDE.md contains key commands
checks.evidence: Only npm test present in CLAUDE.md. Build and lint commands delegated to RULE_COMMANDS.md without summary pointer. Gate passes (commands exist in project).

checks.name: Skills/commands defined
checks.evidence: 3 commands + 16 agents + 155 skill files across 9 domains.

checks.name: Directory nesting depth
checks.evidence: Max depth 8, average 4.05. Pass threshold <=8.

checks.name: Files per directory
checks.evidence: Average 8.5 files/dir across 169 source dirs. Under 15 threshold.

checks.name: No junk drawer directories
checks.evidence: 7 dirs exceed 50 files: migrations-archive (368), ra-wrappers (98), ui (84), organizations (75), opportunities (75), contacts (66), .claude/hooks/state (66).

checks.name: Consistent naming convention
checks.evidence: 93.3% kebab-case compliance. 5 camelCase/PascalCase exceptions.

checks.name: Barrel/index file coverage
checks.evidence: 64 of 96 qualifying dirs (66.7%) have barrels. Above 20% threshold.

checks.name: No monolith files
checks.evidence: No hand-written monoliths >5000. 1 auto-generated: database.generated.ts (5,919). Critical gate passes. Listed in CLAUDE.md 'Do Not Read'.

checks.name: Source/test/config separation
checks.evidence: 5+ clear separations: src/, tests/, docs/, supabase/, scripts/, config at root.

checks.name: Module README coverage
checks.evidence: 71.7% of major subdirs have README.md. 32/32 atomic-crm feature dirs = 100%.

checks.name: Clear application entry point
checks.evidence: src/main.tsx -> App.tsx -> CRM.tsx. Single unambiguous chain.

checks.name: Route definitions discoverable
checks.evidence: 14 Resource declarations centralized in CRM.tsx. CustomRoutes in same file.

checks.name: Configuration sources clear
checks.evidence: 22 source files access import.meta.env directly (threshold >15). No centralized config.ts/env.ts abstraction. .env.example exists but reads are scattered.

checks.name: Slash commands defined
checks.evidence: 3 commands on disk: commit.md, find-feature.md, fix-lint.md. 8 previously tracked commands deleted.

checks.name: Agent definitions exist
checks.evidence: 16 agent definitions in .claude/agents/.

checks.name: Linter config exists
checks.evidence: eslint.config.js + .prettierrc.mjs at project root.

checks.name: Type safety configured
checks.evidence: tsconfig strict: true + noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess.

checks.name: Pattern consistency
checks.evidence: Handler files share identical structure: JSDoc header, same imports, same factory signature, same wrapper composition. Consistent @ aliases.

checks.name: .gitignore comprehensive
checks.evidence: Covers node_modules, dist, .env, IDE, OS files, coverage, Supabase secrets, .mcp.json.

checks.name: Convention language actionable
checks.evidence: 4 imperative types (ALWAYS, NEVER, MUST, DO NOT). 0 vague terms (prefer, try to, consider).

checks.name: Do-not-touch zones marked
checks.evidence: 6 protected paths with 'NEVER modify without explicit human approval'. Do Not Read zone for database.generated.ts.

checks.name: MCP servers configured
checks.evidence: .mcp.json with Supabase MCP + fine-grained permissions in .claude/settings.json.

checks.name: Test files exist
checks.evidence: 381 test files, 23.6% ratio. Gate passes. Below 60% for full marks. SQL tests also present.

checks.name: Test runner configured
checks.evidence: Vitest ^3.2.4 with 4 script variants: test, test:ci, test:coverage, test:unit.

checks.name: CI/CD pipeline exists
checks.evidence: 3 GitHub Actions workflows: ci.yml (tests on push/PR), security.yml, supabase-deploy.yml.

checks.name: Pre-commit hooks configured
checks.evidence: Husky pre-commit (188 lines): env blocking, UI patterns, type-checking, color validation, migration drift.

checks.name: Claude Code hooks configured
checks.evidence: PreToolUse (migration-guard, verification-before-git), PostToolUse (prettier, eslint, tracker), Stop (verify-tests).

checks.name: Test command cross-validation
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md 'npm test' matches vitest in package.json. CI uses test:ci (sharded variant).

checks.name: Machine-readable state files
checks.evidence: 7 JSON baselines in docs/audit/baseline/, dated 2026-03-04 (2 days old).

checks.name: Previous audit results available
checks.evidence: readability-score.json (scan-20260305-004), audit-meta.json, confidence-changelog.md.

checks.name: Audit progress file
checks.evidence: No progress/resume file found. No checkpoint artifact for scan resumption.

checks.name: Structured data files
checks.evidence: 4 structured JSON data files: dependency-map, feature-inventory, integration-map, risk-assessment.

checks.name: Total persistent token estimate
checks.evidence: CORRECTED: ~8,533 tokens always-loaded (CLAUDE.md 1,489 + CORE_CONSTRAINTS.md 875 + AGENT_ROUTING.md 849 + skill-index 3,467 + settings 539 + mcp 64 + SKILL catalog ~1,250). Under 10K threshold. Scanner originally reported ~9,167 due to miscounting RULE_COMMANDS.md and RULE_PRECEDENCE.md as unscoped (both have globs: frontmatter).

checks.name: CLAUDE.md instruction density
checks.evidence: 40 imperatives in 108 lines. Under 60 threshold.

checks.name: Rules file scoping ratio
checks.evidence: 10 of 12 rules files have globs: frontmatter. 2 intentionally unscoped (CORE_CONSTRAINTS.md, AGENT_ROUTING.md). 100% effective scoping of scopeable rules.

checks.name: Skills count reasonable
checks.evidence: 9 skills + 3 commands = 12 total. Under 15 threshold.

checks.name: MCP server count
checks.evidence: 2 MCP servers (vercel, supabase). Under 5 threshold.

checks.name: Instruction budget estimate
checks.evidence: CORRECTED: ~95 always-loaded imperatives (CLAUDE.md 40 + CORE_CONSTRAINTS.md 25 + AGENT_ROUTING.md 30). Over 80 threshold but under 120. Scanner originally counted 136 by including RULE_COMMANDS.md (22) and RULE_PRECEDENCE.md (19) which are scoped. Adding globs: to AGENT_ROUTING.md would drop to 65.

checks.name: Progressive disclosure
checks.evidence: Layered: CLAUDE.md -> scoped rules -> agents/skills. 4 doc-pointer lines.

checks.name: No context-budget anti-patterns
checks.evidence: 0 anti-patterns across 9 checks. No code blocks, no duplicates, no orphan rules.

checks.name: Schema source of truth exists
checks.evidence: 6 declarative schema files in supabase/schemas/ (1,169 lines): tables-core, tables-junctions, tables-notes, tables-reference, views, functions.

checks.name: Generated types exist
checks.evidence: database.generated.ts (5,919 lines) exists but ~12 hours stale vs latest migration.

checks.name: Migrations sequential
checks.evidence: 17 sequential timestamped migrations. No gaps.

checks.name: Data access centralized
checks.evidence: composedDataProvider.ts routes to 13+ handlers. CORE-001 enforced. Supabase client in 10 files within provider boundary.

checks.name: Database MCP configured
checks.evidence: Supabase MCP with execute_sql, list_tables, apply_migration, generate_types permissions.

checks.name: Seed data available
checks.evidence: 4 SQL seeds, CSV data, TypeScript fixtures, npm seed scripts.

checks.name: Schema documented in context
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md DB section + DATABASE_LAYER.md (13 rules) + supabase/schemas/README.md.

checks.name: Connection patterns documented
checks.evidence: .env.example with 14 DB vars annotated. CLAUDE.md cloud-only workflow. Fail-fast in supabase.ts.

delta.notes: Score dropped from A- (92.9) to B+ (88.9). Main regressions: (1) 4.3 failed - 22 files scatter import.meta.env with no centralized config module; (2) 2.7/2.9 partial - build/lint commands not directly in CLAUDE.md, only in RULE_COMMANDS.md; (3) 8.6 partial - AGENT_ROUTING.md now always-loaded without globs: frontmatter, pushing instruction count to 95 (was 65). One improvement: 5.3 handler pattern consistency now confirmed across sampled files.
